name: Sendible Social Media Management API
what_it_does: Sendible social media management REST API for agencies and brands to automate social media scheduling, content publishing, engagement monitoring, and client reporting across multiple social platforms with white-label capabilities. Enables AI agents to manage multi-platform social content scheduling and publishing for social media automation, handle social media content calendar and queue management for content planning automation, access social inbox and engagement management for community management automation, retrieve brand monitoring and keyword alert for mention tracking automation, manage white-label agency reporting for client management automation, handle team collaboration and permissions for agency workflow automation, access social media analytics and performance reporting for marketing analytics automation, retrieve content compose and AI writing assistance for content creation automation, manage multi-channel social posting (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Pinterest, Google Business) for omnichannel automation, and integrate Sendible with Canva, Google Analytics, HubSpot, WordPress, and RSS feeds for end-to-end social content workflow automation.
use_cases: Scheduling social content from multi-platform publishing agents
Managing client social from agency white-label agents
Monitoring mentions from brand tracking automation agents
Generating reports from social analytics agents
not_for: Enterprise social media with advanced analytics (use Sprout Social for enterprise)
Influencer relationship management (use dedicated influencer platforms)
Social commerce and shop integration (use native platform tools)
best_when: A social media agency or brand manager wanting AI agents to automate multi-platform content scheduling, client social management, brand monitoring, and white-label reporting within Sendible's agency-focused social management platform.
avoid_when: SOCIAL PLATFORM API CONNECTIVITY DISRUPTION: Sendible connects to social platforms via their respective APIs; changes to Twitter/X, Meta, or LinkedIn API access policies directly impact Sendible functionality; automated social media workflows should monitor platform API policy changes that may affect Sendible connectivity. RSS FEED AUTO-POSTING CONTENT CURATION QUALITY: Sendible RSS feed to social post automation enables automatic content curation; automated RSS-to-social posting without content quality filtering creates low-quality or off-brand automated posts; implement content scoring or keyword filtering for automated RSS curation workflows. INSTAGRAM STORY POSTING NOTIFICATION-BASED WORKFLOW: Instagram Stories via Sendible may use notification-based mobile push (not fully automated server-side); automated Instagram Story publishing may require mobile notification acknowledgment on Sendible mobile app; automated Instagram Story workflows may not be fully hands-free for all content types.

auth.notes: Sendible uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. London, UK HQ. Founded 2009 by Gavin Hammar. Bootstrapped and profitable. Acquired by Jugo Holdings in 2023. Products: Social scheduling, brand monitoring, analytics, white-label agency platform, content compose. Platforms: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Pinterest, YouTube, Google Business. White-label for agencies. Integration: Canva, Google Analytics, HubSpot, WordPress, RSS. GDPR. Competes with Agorapulse, Hootsuite, and Buffer for social media management.

pricing.paid_tiers: Creator ($29/mo, 6 profiles), Traction ($89/mo, 24 profiles), Scale ($199/mo, 49 profiles), Advanced ($299/mo, 100 profiles)
pricing.notes: London UK. Bootstrapped, acquired 2023. Per-user + social profile pricing. 14-day free trial. Agency-friendly.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; scheduling and reporting queries throttled; no webhooks — polling required

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS FOR EVENT-DRIVEN AUTOMATION: Sendible does not support webhooks; automated event-driven workflows (e.g., post published notification, mention alert) require polling the Sendible API; design automated monitoring with polling interval appropriate for freshness requirement; high-frequency polling for real-time monitoring may hit rate limits

WHITE-LABEL SUBDOMAIN REQUIRED FOR AGENCY ACCESS: Sendible white-label requires agency-configured subdomain; automated integration must use agency-specific subdomain URL; API calls to sendible.com without agency subdomain may not access agency client accounts

SOCIAL PROFILE TOKEN EXPIRY FOR CONNECTED ACCOUNTS: Connected social platform OAuth tokens expire; automated publishing workflows must handle token expiry events; expired social platform tokens cause scheduled posts to fail silently without automated alerting; implement token expiry monitoring and reconnection prompting

CONTENT QUEUE ORDERING FOR SCHEDULED POSTS: Sendible queue posts to slots in a content calendar schedule; automated content submission to queue may not post in creation order if queue slots are pre-occupied; verify queue slot availability before automated content submission to ensure expected posting sequence

ANALYTICS DATA AVAILABILITY DELAY: Sendible social analytics data is pulled from social platforms with refresh latency; automated reporting that queries analytics immediately after campaign post may retrieve incomplete data; implement analytics retrieval with appropriate delay (24-48 hours) after campaign publishing for complete engagement data
agent_readiness.security_notes: Social media management. GDPR. API key. UK/EU. Social content, schedule, and analytics data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Social media management. GDPR. API key. UK/EU. Social content and publishing data.
